narrative:
Warren City 2F (precinct in Trumbull County) has 883 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.4 percentage points.
